rationale: Educ. Code §38.153 governs concussion oversight and return-to-play protocols for school athletics. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The governing body of each school district and open-enrollment charter school with students enrolled who participate in an interscholastic athletic activity shall appoint or approve a concussion oversight team.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no interaction between the two provisions.
